modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help creating accessible PDF from Word document

full_description_text: 
Estoy tratando de hacer un PDF accesible desde Word. No sé cómo hacerlo bien. Usando Adobe PDG, pero no funciona. ¿Alguien puede ayudarme?
short_description: Need help creating accessible PDF from Word document
description: Estoy tratando de hacer un PDF accesible desde Word. No sé cómo hacerlo bien. Usando Adobe PDG, pero no funciona. ¿Alguien puede ayudarme?
